scripts.codegen: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='../api-zod/src/index.ts';fs.writeFileSync(p,fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace(/\nexport \* from '.\/.generated\/types';/g,'').replace(/^export \* from '.\/.generated\/types';\n/gm,''))" && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
